title: Ametek (AME) Q3 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
text: Ametek (AME) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 5.84% and 2.32%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
